query:
UPDATE customers SET 
  fieldManager = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 5 THEN 'Adeya Deweyi'
    WHEN id <= 10 THEN 'Test Worker 1'
    WHEN id <= 15 THEN 'Test Worker 2'
    ELSE 'Unassigned'
  END,
  assignmentStatus = CASE 
    WHEN id <= 8 THEN 'completed'
    WHEN id <= 18 THEN 'assigned'
    ELSE 'unassigned'
  END
WHERE id > 0;
